feat.critical_failure: The target takes 6 persistent spirit damage. The first time the creature fails their flat check to recover from this, the persistent spirit damage doubles.
feat.failure: The target takes 4 persistent spirit damage. The first time the creature fails their flat check to recover from this, the persistent spirit damage doubles.
feat.name: Chastise
feat.success: The target takes 2 persistent spirit damage. The first time the creature fails their flat check to recover from this, the persistent spirit damage doubles.
feat.text: With but a mere word from your deity, you exploit a foe’s fear to see their inner being brought low. You chastise the spirit of a foe within 30 feet that has the frightened condition. The target must attempt a Will saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Sanctified
traits.text: If you are holy or unholy, your sanctified actions and spells gain the same trait.
